narrative:
Perry Twp township has 729 registered voters, with 53.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.9 percentage points.
